summary: First test run of Fitness Quest pure frontend app. Most core features work. Two critical UI bugs found related to bottom nav overlap with LOG WORKOUT button and 'Made with Emergent' badge blocking EXPLORE tab.

ui_bugs.issue: LOG WORKOUT button (y=852, height=64px) is partially hidden behind fixed bottom nav (y=870). Only top ~18px of the 64px button is above the nav. The button CAN be clicked but only at its top edge - visually it appears partially cut off.

'Made with Emergent' floating badge (x=272-398, y=886-906) overlaps the EXPLORE nav button (x=286-430, y=870-932). Clicking the center of the EXPLORE tab is blocked by the badge. Only the very top portion (y=870-886) of the button is clickable.

issues: Large empty space below the class bonus card (stats at top, then class bonus, then ~400px black empty space before the LOG WORKOUT button at the very bottom). Content is not distributed well.

action_items: Fix LOG WORKOUT button overlap with bottom nav - Camp component needs pb-20 or similar to push button above nav height (h-16=64px)
The 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the EXPLORE nav tab - this is a platform-level issue that may need z-index adjustment on the nav or repositioning badge
critical_code_review_comments: Camp.jsx: The Camp component uses min-h-screen flex flex-col with the LOG WORKOUT button at the bottom div. The App.js wrapper has pb-16 (64px) for nav clearance, but Camp internally takes min-h-screen so the button ends up behind the nav. Fix: add pb-20 to the Camp's inner content div or adjust button position.

The 'Made with Emergent' badge appears at approximately y=886, overlapping the EXPLORE nav tab which starts at y=870. Since the badge is z-indexed above everything, it blocks the explore tab click at center.
LevelUpModal shows '+1$ XP EARNED' in pixel font rendering but actually correctly shows '+18 XP EARNED' - it's a pixel font rendering artifact in screenshots only.
test_credentials: No auth needed. Used TestHero / warrior for testing.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage injection for game state setup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests that passed: Onboarding (name + class selection), validation error on empty submit, Camp screen display (name/level/XP), Workout modal (opens, XP preview, submission), XP calculation (warrior+strength 10min=36XP correct), Level-up modal (triggers correctly, shows level/XP/SP), Hero screen (SP counter, stat values, upgrade buttons disabled at SP=0 / enabled at SP>0), Exploration zones (all 3 visible), Mission ember_1 SUCCESS (STR>=1 passes), Mission ember_2 FAIL (AGI>=2 fails), Inventory after mission, localStorage persistence. Tests blocked by bugs: EXPLORE tab navigation was only possible by clicking top 5px of button (badge blocks center); LOG WORKOUT only clickable at top 5px (nav overlaps). Use page.mouse.click(btn_x+w/2, btn_y+5) pattern to work around these in testing.
rca_of_issues: Both issues stem from the fixed 'Made with Emergent' platform badge overlapping interactive elements: 1) The EXPLORE nav button occupies the rightmost third of the bottom nav, and the badge sits on top of it blocking clicks. 2) The LOG WORKOUT button is positioned at the very bottom of Camp.jsx flex layout, ending up at y=852 with the fixed nav at y=870, making only the top 18px clickable above the nav.
